occurrence_sentence: A Chinese initial public offering for a quantum technology company, much like the technology that underlies it, went exponential, [Bloomberg is reporting](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2020-07-09/chinese-ipo-s-876-first-day-gain-shows-growing-mania-for-stocks).

The news outlet is reporting that [QuantumCTek Co.](https://www.bloomberg.com/quote/688027:CH "Company Overview"), which bills itself as a quantum info company and lists on the science and technology board, soared nearly tenfold on its trading debut.

A Chinese initial public offering for a quantum technology company, much like the technology that underlies it, went exponential, [Bloomberg is reporting](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2020-07-09/chinese-ipo-s-876-first-day-gain-shows-growing-mania-for-stocks).

The company, which develops information security products, closed 924% above its 36.18 yuan ($5.18) issue price on China's Star board. This IPO far exceeded the previous record of a 614% first-day jump, posted just on Tuesday by [Tinavi Medical Technologies Co.](https://www.bloomberg.com/quote/688277:CH "Company Overview")
